votes.reason: Morpeton's novelty ensures genuine evaluation of in-context learning while JSON and Python present unacceptable contamination and safety risks respectively.
A 30-line limit creates optimal pressure for strategic prioritization while avoiding excessive truncation errors that could compromise tactical coherence.
Strict grammatical separation between expressive conditions and restricted actions maintains both strategic flexibility and implementation safety.
Including tactical primitives like OVERWATCH and FLANK reduces unnecessary verbosity while terrain integration into movement commands preserves linguistic minimalism.
Prioritizing simple parser architecture with regex/PEG parsing balances implementation robustness with the critical zero-execution safety requirement.
